prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a stunning 20-year-old Indonesian woman standing in a lush green park on a bright sunny morning, holding a premium black mirrorless camera close to one eye as if taking a photograph. She has long, silky jet-black hair flowing naturally with a soft side part, warm light-medium Indonesian skin tone, elegant facial features, a gentle sweet smile, expressive dark-brown eyes, and minimal natural makeup with a fresh radiant glow. She is wearing a beautiful sleeveless blue floral dress with a flowing skirt that moves softly in the breeze, creating an elegant and feminine look. The dress features delicate floral patterns in soft white and light-blue tones, giving a fresh spring aesthetic. No jacket, no accessories that distract from the outfit. The setting is a peaceful green park with vibrant trees, colorful flowers, neatly trimmed grass, and warm golden morning sunlight filtering through the leaves. Creamy natural background bokeh, authentic candid photography vibe, realistic skin texture, cinematic depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8, DSLR-quality editorial fashion photography, ultra-detailed 8K, natural colors, clean composition, soft breeze gently moving her hair and dress, highly photorealistic, no heavy AI look, no extra fingers, anatomically correct hands, no blur, no watermark, no text.

promptZh: 一张超逼真的生活方式肖像，主角是一位迷人的 20 岁的印尼女性，站在 郁郁葱葱的绿色公园 中，背景是明媚的清晨。她手持一台高端黑色无反相机靠近一只眼睛，仿佛正在拍照。她留着一头柔顺的乌黑长发，自然垂落并带有柔和的侧分，拥有温暖的中等肤色、优雅的五官、温柔甜美的微笑、富有表现力的深褐色眼睛，以及极简的自然妆容，散发着清新光泽。她身穿一件漂亮的 无袖蓝色碎花连衣裙，裙摆在微风中轻轻飘动，营造出优雅且充满女性魅力的造型。裙子采用柔和的白色和浅蓝色精致花卉图案，呈现出清新的春日美感。不穿外套，无任何分散服装注意力的配饰。场景是一个宁静的绿色公园，有充满活力的树木、色彩斑斓的花朵、修剪整齐的草坪，温暖的金色晨光透过叶片洒下。奶油般的自然背景虚化，真实的抓拍氛围，逼真的皮肤纹理，电影级景深，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，单反相机品质的编辑时尚摄影，超细节 8K，自然色彩，构图干净，微风轻轻拂动她的头发和裙摆，高度写实，无浓重的 AI 感，无多余手指，解剖结构正确的手部，无模糊，无水印，无文字。
